existing_features.title: Set the default value of the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" radio field to "Yes" when the app loads with no URL parameters (i.e., update the default inputs so this boolean is true by default).

Update URL query parsing/encoding behavior for the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" field so that an explicit URL value of false (e.g., `res6y=false`) is respected even after the default becomes true, while keeping the existing query parameter name `res6y` unchanged.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add/adjust field 'Result updated since 6 months' so its default value is 'Yes'
